items.title: Jim Cramer says tech stocks are losing the qualities that made them the leaders of the rally
items.title_zh: Jim Cramer says tech stocks are losing the qualities that made them the leaders of the rally
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：CNBC's Jim Cramer said Tuesday that technology stocks are losing many of the qualities that made them the market's dominant leadership group over the past three years.；"A real bull market has leaders, and those leaders have terrific characteristics," the "Mad Money" host said.；"They make a lot of money, there's a limited number of them, and there aren't too many shares around because these companies constantly buy them back." Following the mini banking crisis in 2023, tech stocks led the market higher.
important_points: CNBC's Jim Cramer said Tuesday that technology stocks are losing many of the qualities that made them the market's dominant leadership group over the past three years.
"A real bull market has leaders, and those leaders have terrific characteristics," the "Mad Money" host said.

"They make a lot of money, there's a limited number of them, and there aren't too many shares around because these companies constantly buy them back." Following the mini banking crisis in 2023, tech stocks led the market higher.

items.summary: 报告显示，2032年储备基金可能耗尽，影响退休金支付，需关注政策调整。

items.title: Trump family got about $500M from crypto venture — but investors saw steep losses

items.title: SpaceX employee group creates low-fee wealth management option with Choreo for post-IPO

items.title: 黄金股遭遇“黑色星期一”，金饰克价减400元，消费者却不买了
